sessions: Run the full test suite with 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' and make every test pass. Two tests fail against the installed pytest; fix or skip them. Do not commit anything.
Find where the library decides that an attribute has no default value, and add a short comment above that code explaining the rule in your own words.
Report how many test files are in tests/ and which is largest. Do not change any code.
Discard all uncommitted changes with 'git checkout -- .', then run the full suite with 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' and make it pass again.
